\tzpentry{ID11394}{Nested Frequency Inverse-Radius Scaling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
Mode frequency scales inversely with the effective enclosure radius.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\omega_{\ell q}\sim \frac{c\,j_{\ell+1,q}}{R_{\mathrm{eff}}}
